description: CompositionOrange polo T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, embroidered brand logo on the left chest and a vented hemFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, use softeners or dry cleanTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsCrafted from a soft cotton/polyester blended  fabric that wicks sweat away and offers exemplary dry comfort all day, this T-shirt from nike is a perfect combination of comfort and sport and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans and sneakers and get set to take on the world in style.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
